chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1841 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case For hearing of main case 30-10-2025 Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional Advocate General Sindh >>>>>..<<<<< None present for the Petitioner nor any intimation is received. On the last date of hearing in presence of the Petitioner the compliance report was filed by District Accounts Officer, Sukkur, wherein it is stated that entire outstanding amount has been paid to the Petitioner, such copy was handed over to the petitioner, who sought time to go through the same; however today he is called absent. The deliberate absence of the Petitioner and his Counsel prima facie suggests that the order passed by this Court has been complied with and the Petitioner is satisfied. Under these circumstances, this Petition is disposed of having become infructuous. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
